scripts.test: python3 -m json.tool evals/evals.json >/dev/null && python3 -m json.tool .claude-plugin/plugin.json >/dev/null && python3 -m json.tool .claude-plugin/marketplace.json >/dev/null && python3 scripts/check-plugin-version.py && python3 scripts/check-command-surface-drift.py
scripts.validate: claude plugin validate .claude-plugin/plugin.json && claude plugin validate . && git diff --check && python3 -m json.tool evals/evals.json >/dev/null && python3 -m json.tool .claude-plugin/plugin.json >/dev/null && python3 -m json.tool .claude-plugin/marketplace.json >/dev/null && python3 scripts/check-plugin-version.py && python3 scripts/check-command-surface-drift.py
